title: Remin: Realistic Minerals
description: Adds tons of ores, metals, minerals and tools to the game, as well as game mechanics based on their real behaviour. Changes the vanilla game progression from the very start to the very end.
body:
![Re:Mined – Rwalistic Minerals.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ea176a2e1d90032cfac2cfd2cb414f4798ca3166_0.webp)  
Overhauls pickaxe tier mechanics with 10 tiers from wood to diamond, adds a myriad of ores and generated blocks for obtaining various metals and minerals which can be used by other mods, along with several new tool and armour sets.  New game progression engaging from spawn to finish.  This mod also allows you to craft stone tools and furnaces with Diorite, Andesite, Granite and (the new) Feldspar.

Built-in compatibility with Ars Nouveau, Hexerei, Ice And Fire, Immersive Aircraft, Iron Chests, Epic Knights, Gelaria, Nameless Trinkets, Simply Swords, Supplementaries and Tough as Nails. Should also work with mods such as Industrial Craft and Tinker's Construct.

Planned compatibility with Oritech for future versions.

Some minerals are specific to a group of biomes or even to a certain biome and are not universally distributed throughout the world. Some resources may also be specific to certain dimensions.

! ATTENTION ! WILL CHANGE VANILLA PROGRESSION !

New Pickaxe Tiers:  
1- Wood  
2- Stone  
3- Bronze / Iron / Nickel (Bronze required to obtain iron)  
4- Steel / Titanium  
5- Quartz  
5.5 (not necessary) - Tungsten  
6- Topaz  
6.5 (not necessary) - Chromium  
7- Ruby / Sapphire  
8- Diamond  
The previous tier is required to obtain the next. 
Blocks can only be harvested by a pickaxe of equal or higher hardness, the hardness is stated in the tooltips.  
Flint can now only be obtained with a steel or better shovel.  
The vanilla diamond has been repurposed as a quartz, it still slots into the game progression after steel.

New Metals:  
· Albemet  
· Aluminium  
· Beryllium  
· Bronze (produces green flames, as Copper)  
· Chromium  
· Lead (falls, produces blue flames)  
· Nickel  
· Mercury  
· Platinum (falls)  
· Purple Gold  
· Rose Gold  
· Silicon  
· Silver  
· Steel  
· Tin  
· Titanium  
· Tungsten (lava-immune)  
· Uranium  
· White Gold  

New Minerals:  
· Alexandrite (changes colour, found in Snowy Plains)  
· Aquamarine (found in Oceans)  
· Azurite (green flames, crafts Lapis)  
· Blue Topaz  
· Brown Diamond  
· Carbonado (Diamond, found in Jungles)  
· Chromite  
· Chrysoprase (Quartz)  
· Cinnabar  
· Cuprite (green flames)  
· Feldspar  
· Golden Beryl (found in Mountains)  
· Larimar (Found in Beaches)  
· Malachite (water-weathered Azurite, green flames)  
· Morganite (found in Mountains)  
· Pink Diamond (found below Mountains)  
· Pyrite (Fool's Gold, crafts Lapis)  
· Rose Quartz  
· Ruby  
· Rutile  
· White Diamond  
· Yellow Amethyst (Amethyst exposed to sunlight)  
· Yellow Diamond (found in Savannahs)  
· Yellow Topaz

Many different smelting and blasting recipes for obtaining metals from minerals, try your gems in a Blast Furnace.
